title: Sniffer Reimagined
description: Adds new features to make the Sniffer more interesting.
body:
# Description

Sniffer Reimagined is a mod that aims to make the Sniffer more interesting. It does this by adding more items Sniffers can find, including new farming, fishing, and crafting items. Additionally, four Sniffer variants have been added to the game, all obtainable by hatching a Sniffer Egg in specific biomes. Try to collect them all in your world!

# Additional Sniffer Drops

![new diggable items list](https://i.imgur.com/zeFGMrM.png)

Sniffers can now dig up:

- Red & Brown Mushrooms
- Iron Root
- Worm

## Iron Root

The Iron Root is a new item that can be smelted into an Iron Ingot using a furnace or blast furnace. This allows for Sniffers to be used to make simple iron farms.

## Worm

Worms are a new addition that have many uses. They can be fed to certain mobs, including Sniffers, Chickens, Frogs, Turtles, and Axolotls. Worms can also be used in Composters to create bone meal.

### Farming

![enriched farmland](https://i.imgur.com/nXmfOeI.png)

There is a 40% chance that right-clicking a worm on farmland will convert it into Enriched Farmland. Enriched Farmland grows your crops faster than traditional farmland, making your farms more productive.

### Fishing

![applying worm as bait in inventory](https://i.imgur.com/fuKEXIA.png)

You can pick up the worm in your inventory and left-click on a fishing rod to attach it as bait. Doing this makes fishing much faster. By default, worms reduce the time to catch a fish by 15 seconds. This also stacks with enchantments such as [Lure](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Lure).

# Nether Sniffer Drops

![nether sniffer diggable items list](https://i.imgur.com/H9DSR9k.png)

Sniffer Reimagined also introduces two Nether variants to Sniffers. These variants are the Crimson & Warped Sniffer. Sniffers hatched in the Nether can dig up:

- Crimson & Warped Mushrooms
- Nether Wart
- Gold Root
- Ghast Tear
- Blaze Rod
- Skeleton Skull Fragments

## Gold Root

The Gold Root is a new item that can be smelted into a Gold Ingot using a furnace or blast furnace. This allows you to use Nether Sniffers to make simple gold farms.

## Skeleton Skull Fragments

The Skeleton Skull Fragment and Wither Skeleton Skull Fragment are new items found by Sniffers hatched in the Nether. Using nine of these fragments in a crafting grid can craft a skull of its respective type. This offers an alternative to farming skulls and introduces a viable method for peaceful mode players.

# Other Variants

In total, there are 5 Sniffer Variants. These variants are:

- Default
- Cherry
- Cold
- Warped
- Crimson

## Cherry Sniffer

![cherry sniffer](https://i.imgur.com/otFca4r.png)

The Cherry Sniffer can be obtained by hatching a Sniffer Egg in a Cherry Grove.

## Cold Sniffer

![cold sniffer](https://i.imgur.com/xqqPw04.png)

The Cold Sniffer can be obtained by hatching a Sniffer Egg in a snowy or icy biome.

## Warped Sniffer

![warped sniffer](https://i.imgur.com/ZjqWJFW.png)

The Warped Sniffer can be obtained by hatching a Sniffer Egg in a Warped Forest.

## Crimson Sniffer

The Crimson Sniffer can be obtained by hatching a Sniffer Egg anywhere in the Nether (outside of a Warped Forest).

# Additional Tweaks

- Wandering Traders can now sell Sniffer Eggs
- Sniffers no longer have an eight-minute cooldown for sniffing items
- Sniffers now can dig up loot in places they've already searched

# Credits

Much thanks to [Torrezx](https://modrinth.com/user/Torrezx) for permitting the use of textures from the [Biome Sniffers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torrezx-biome-sniffers) resource pack!
